headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) Following Its Seven Day Slide Is The Stock Still Cheap
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) has come under pressure after seven straight daily declines, with the stock down about 10.9% and roughly US$2.3b of market value erased in that stretch. See our latest analysis for International Flavors & Fragrances. Despite the recent 10.9% slide, International Flavors & Fragrances still shows a 10.7% year to date share price return. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 3.9% and the 5 year total shareholder return decline of 40.6% indicate...
